bugs.class: auth-gap (jwt.decode does NOT verify the signature; forged tokens are accepted)
null-deref (payload from decode can be null; payload.sid throws, and the await is unguarded)
wrong-arithmetic (days*24*60*1000 computes minutes not ms; sessions expire ~60x too soon)
timing (=== on the CSRF token is not constant-time; leaks via timing)
